svg.title: Comparative training data sizes for modern foundation models
svg.desc: Log-scale comparison with an accordion axis break, current 2026 LLM anchors and neuroimaging foundation models.

g.text: Bullet size scales with the log of the dataset size. Units vary by domain: tokens for LLMs; scans, studies, or image-text pairs for medical models.
*Closed/undisclosed models placed at estimated frontier scale. Disclosed sources: Qwen3.6 ~25T & Qwen3 36T tokens; GPT-3 paper (300B); Gemma 4 model card (Jan-2025 cutoff, count not published);
BiomedCLIP PMC-15M; MedSAM; MR-RATE release notes; BrainLM ICLR 2024 (77,298 fMRI recordings); BrainGFM openreview; BrainIAC Nature Neuroscience.

cc:Work.dc:title: Comparative training data sizes for modern foundation models
